name: iccl-website
description: Static website for Inhale Culture Celebrate Life Ltd — built with Eleventy + esbuild, deployed to GitHub Pages.

scripts.build:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('_site',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('Constitution of Inhale Culture Celebrate Life Ltd (ICCL) - 2025.pdf','_site/Constitution of Inhale Culture Celebrate Life Ltd (ICCL) - 2025.pdf');fs.writeFileSync('_site/.nojekyll','')"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run build:html && npm run build:assets
